name: Safed Shorva- a Light, Cold Yogurt Soup - India
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups chicken stock (cold from refrigerator, strained)
1/2 tablespoon fresh ginger root (peeled and grated)
2 tablespoons fresh mint or green coriander or a mixture, finely chopped
Salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the yogurt in a bowl.
2. Beat with a fork until smooth and creamy.
3. Slowly add the stock, mixing it in as you do so.
4. Add all remaining ingredients; mix well.
5. Refrigerate until needed.
6. Stir well before serving.
7. Garnish as desired.
